nodes.context: Commune, gang and cult led by Charles Manson, active in California in the late 1960s and early 1970s, responsible for multiple murders.
Motorcycle club whose treasurer Danny DeCarlo was involved with the Manson Family; members acted as security for the Family at Spahn Ranch.
Militant Black nationalist organization; Manson feared retaliation from them after shooting Bernard Crowe, mistakenly believing Crowe was a member.
Prison gang that temporarily accepted Manson after his return to prison.

edges.context: Straight Satans members provided security for the Manson Family at Spahn Ranch; treasurer Danny DeCarlo had access to Family women.
Manson feared retaliation from the Black Panthers after shooting Bernard Crowe, mistakenly believing Crowe was a Panther.
Manson found temporary acceptance from the Aryan Brotherhood in prison.
